'''gatazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaderine|leaderine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaderine|leaderine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gatazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gætæzhæth|gætæzhæth]] || [[word:gætæzhæj|gætæzhæj]] || [[word:gætæzhæsh|gætæzhæsh]] || [[word:gætæzhæ|gætæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gatatazhath|gatatazhath]] || [[word:gatatazhaj|gatatazhaj]] || [[word:gatatazhash|gatatazhash]] || [[word:gatatazha|gatatazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gatazhath|gatazhath]] || [[word:gatazhaj|gatazhaj]] || [[word:gatazhash|gatazhash]] || [[word:gatazha|gatazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gatafzhath|gatafzhath]] || [[word:gatafzhaj|gatafzhaj]] || [[word:gatafzhash|gatafzhash]] || [[word:gatafzhaf|gatafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gatazhatha|gatazhatha]] || [[word:gatazhaja|gatazhaja]] || [[word:gatazhasha|gatazhasha]] || [[word:gatazhaka|gatazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gatazhath|gatazhath]] || [[word:gatazhaj|gatazhaj]] || [[word:gatazhash|gatazhash]] || [[word:gatazha|gatazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gatazhathal|gatazhathal]] || [[word:gatazhajal|gatazhajal]] || [[word:gatazhashal|gatazhashal]] || [[word:gatazhakal|gatazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gatazhathatha|gatazhathatha]] || [[word:gatazhajaja|gatazhajaja]] || [[word:gatazhashasha|gatazhashasha]] || [[word:gatazhaka|gatazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gatazhathan|gatazhathan]] || [[word:gatazhajan|gatazhajan]] || [[word:gatazhashan|gatazhashan]] || [[word:gatazhakan|gatazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gatazhathaoro|gatazhathaoro]] || [[word:gatazhajaoro|gatazhajaoro]] || [[word:gatazhashaoro|gatazhashaoro]] || [[word:gatazhakaoro|gatazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
